title: Ollama node fails to engage MCP client due to context length
symptom: When using the Ollama node with the gpt-OSS 20B model, the agent does not engage the MCP client correctly, leading to confusion in responses. In contrast, the OpenRouter node works as expected.
root_cause: The Ollama node may have a different context length limitation compared to the OpenRouter node, which affects its ability to process and respond to queries correctly. This discrepancy can lead to the agent not engaging the MCP client as intended.
fix_steps: Check the context length settings for the Ollama node
Adjust the context length to match or be compatible with the OpenRouter node
Test the workflow again to see if the MCP client engages correctly
agent_instruction: Adjust the context length settings for the Ollama node to ensure compatibility.
